name: The Maa mark
concept: A dignified, minimal line-portrait of a mother — hair in a bun, bindi, a knowing half-smile — held inside a warm embrace ring. The human heart of the brand; Cmaa reads as Seema and carries Maa (mother).

name: Chakli-Sun / Marigold mark
concept: A true chakli spiral coil at the centre of a terracotta disc, ringed by a double layer of radiant gold and mustard petals that double as sun rays and a marigold bloom. Iconic, optimistic, festive and infinitely scalable.

name: Warmth mark
concept: Steam rising from a homemade bowl — a warm terracotta vessel with a cream snack line and three graceful steam wisps conveying freshly-made care. Minimal, modern, premium geometry.
